backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a food ordering backend with functions to place orders, retrieve orders by ID, get all orders, check order status, and get order confirmation. Includes blob storage mixin and defines Item and Order types.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, styling approach, and key functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Golden Waffle House Vite/React app, mounting the React root and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for Home, Menu, Cart, and Order Confirmation pages, wrapped in QueryClientProvider, CartProvider, and a Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/CartItemRow.tsx: Cart item row component displaying product image, name, per-item price in INR, quantity controls, line total, and a remove button, with per-row color accents cycling through six OKLCH colors.
Checkout panel component with delivery address input, COD/GPay payment method selection, order summary totals, and a Place Order button that calls the placeOrder mutation and navigates to the confirmation page.
frontend/src/components/FloatingHearts.t: Empty file placeholder for a FloatingHearts component.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky navigation bar with a dark purple gradient background, orange gradient logo, Home/Menu/Cart links, a cart item count badge, and a rainbow accent divider at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a styled product card with image, badge, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button, using per-product color accents and showing current cart quantity via toast notifications.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: Provides a React context for cart state management, exposing actions to add, remove, update, and clear items along with derived totals for item count and price.
frontend/src/data/products.ts: Exports a static array of 12 waffle product objects with id, name, description, price, image URL, and optional badge fields.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a `usePlaceOrder` mutation hook that calls the backend actor's `placeOrder` method, falling back to a timestamp-based order ID if the actor is unavailable or the call fails.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind CSS styles, custom OKLCH-based design tokens for a dark waffle-shop theme, and keyframe animations for fade, scale, and slide transitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Displays the shopping cart page with a header, list of cart items via CartItemRow, and a checkout section; shows an empty-state prompt when no items are present.
frontend/src/pages/ConfirmationPage.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the landing home page with a hero banner, feature highlights, and stats for the Golden Waffle House storefront.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/MenuPage.tsx: Displays the full product menu in a responsive grid using ProductCard components, with a floating cart button that appears when items are in the cart.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Shows a post-order confirmation page with the order ID, a visual tracking stepper, and navigation options back to home or the menu.
frontend/src/types/product.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for Product (id, name, description, price, imageUrl, badge) and CartItem (product + quantity).
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, brand colors, font families, border radii, and plugins including typography, container-queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata and feature requests; currently has one pending request to publish the existing Version 10 dark-theme draft as the live production version.
